meaning: (游戏或运动的)队；(一起工作的)组，班
example: Our team won the basketball match yesterday. (我们队昨天赢了篮球比赛。)
He is the best player on the football team. (他是足球队里最好的运动员。)
Please give the book to him. (请把这本书给他。)
What a lovely garden you have! (你的花园真漂亮！)
She is clever enough to solve the puzzle. (她足够聪明，能解开这个谜题。)
My grandfather looks very young for his age. (我爷爷看上去比实际年龄年轻很多。)
She is a hard-working student who always finishes her homework on time. (她是一个勤奋的学生，总是按时完成作业。)
I like science because we can do experiments. (我喜欢科学课，因为我们可以做实验。)
The robot can help us do housework. (这个机器人可以帮我们做家务。)
The rabbit can jump very high. (那只兔子能跳得很高。)
We need a rope to tie the boat. (我们需要一根绳子来拴住船。)
She has been playing the piano since she was five. (她从五岁起就开始弹钢琴了。)
My father taught me how to play chess. (我爸爸教我怎么下国际象棋。)
There is a big tree in front of the house. (房子前面有一棵大树。)
This question is very easy to answer. (这个问题很容易回答。)
She dreams of becoming a movie star one day. (她梦想有一天成为电影明星。)
We had a wonderful time at the party. (我们在派对上玩得很开心。)
Kangaroos live in Australia. (袋鼠生活在澳大利亚。)
She felt sad when her best friend moved away. (她最好的朋友搬走后，她很难过。)
What's the matter with you? You look pale. (你怎么了？你脸色苍白。)
We are working on a science project together. (我们正在一起做一个科学项目。)
The shopping centre is in the middle of the city. (购物中心在市中心。)
I agree with you that we should leave early. (我同意你的看法，我们应该早点出发。)
I need to finish my homework before dinner. (我需要在晚饭前完成作业。)
We have a maths test every Monday. (我们每周一都有数学测验。)
My mother is worried about my health. (我妈妈担心我的健康。)
Both of my parents are teachers. (我父母都是老师。)
The children are excited about the trip to the zoo. (孩子们对去动物园的旅行很兴奋。)
I'm sorry, but your answer is wrong. (抱歉，你的答案是错的。)
My father was angry because I broke the window. (我爸爸很生气，因为我打破了窗户。)
She is afraid of the dark. (她害怕黑暗。)
My parents always support my decisions. (我父母总是支持我的决定。)
Don't be afraid to ask if you don't understand. (不懂就问，不要害怕。)
We are going to move to a new city next month. (我们下个月要搬到新的城市。)

meaning: 您的(用于书信结尾的签名前)
example: Yours sincerely, Li Ming. (您真诚的，李明。)
We have English class every Wednesday. (我们每周三有英语课。)
My favourite subject is history. (我最喜欢的学科是历史。)
The meeting is scheduled for Tuesday afternoon. (会议安排在周二下午。)
Thank God it's Friday! (谢天谢地，终于周五了！)
I stayed at home because it was raining. (我待在家，因为外面在下雨。)
We have a music lesson on Thursday. (我们周四有音乐课。)
Let's start our lesson now. (我们现在开始上课吧。)
I usually get up at seven o'clock. (我通常七点起床。)
What do you usually do at the weekend? (你周末通常做什么？)
Sometimes I walk to school, sometimes I take the bus. (我有时走路去学校，有时坐公交。)
We always go shopping on Saturday. (我们周六总是去购物。)
Sunday is a day of rest for our family. (周日是我们家的休息日。)
We have a piano lesson every Friday. (我们每周五有钢琴课。)
We usually watch TV in the evening. (我们晚上通常看电视。)
Please raise your hand if you know the answer. (知道答案的同学请举手。)
Let's play ping-pong after school. (放学后我们打乒乓球吧。)
I like to read a book at night before sleeping. (我喜欢晚上睡觉前读一会儿书。)
We are going to visit my grandparents this weekend. (这个周末我们要去看望祖父母。)

meaning: 祖父；祖母；外祖父；外祖母
example: My grandparents live in the countryside. (我的祖父母住在乡下。)
I decided to stay at home because of the rain. (因为下雨，我决定待在家里。)
You should drink more water when you have a cold. (感冒时你应该多喝水。)
I had the flu last week and missed three days of school. (我上周得了流感，缺了三天课。)
Is there anything else you want to tell me? (你还有什么别的想告诉我吗？)
Doing exercise every day is good for your health. (每天锻炼对你的健康有好处。)
We don't have enough time to finish the work. (我们没有足够的时间来完成这项工作。)
If it rains tomorrow, we will stay at home. (如果明天下雨，我们就待在家。)
Reading before bed is a good habit. (睡前读书是个好习惯。)
My favourite TV show is on at eight o'clock. (我最喜欢的电视节目在八点播出。)
My phone rang while I was doing my homework. (我在做作业时电话响了。)
First we eat dinner, then we can watch TV. (我们先吃晚饭，然后可以看电视。)
You have been working all day. You need to rest. (你工作了一整天，需要休息一下。)
My sister helps me take care of the dog. (我妹妹帮我照顾狗。)
Please check your homework before handing it in. (交作业前请检查一下。)

meaning: (与不可数名词连用)较少的，更少的
example: You should eat less sugar for your health. (为了健康，你应该少吃糖。)
You should brush your teeth twice a day. (你应该每天刷两次牙。)
I have a loose tooth. (我有一颗牙松了。)
I go to the library twice a week. (我每周去两次图书馆。)
It takes me an hour to finish my homework. (我花一个小时完成作业。)

meaning: 没有安排活动的；空闲的
example: I am free this Saturday. Let's play basketball! (我这周六有空，我们去打篮球吧！)
I'm so hungry that I could eat a horse. (我饿得能吃下一匹马。)
I'd like a bowl of beef noodles, please. (我想要一碗牛肉面。)
Children love eating ice cream in summer. (夏天孩子们喜欢吃冰激凌。)
Can I have a little more rice, please? (我能再要一点米饭吗？)
We always make dumplings for the Spring Festival. (我们春节总是包饺子。)
Would you like a cup of tea? (你想来杯茶吗？)
I had a hamburger and some fries for lunch. (我午餐吃了一个汉堡和一些薯条。)

meaning: 太太，夫人(用于女子的姓氏或姓名前)
example: Mrs Wang is our English teacher. (王太太是我们的英语老师。)
We drank fresh coconut water on the beach. (我们在海滩上喝了新鲜的椰子水。)
The book is so interesting that I can't put it down. (这本书太有趣了，我爱不释手。)
We planted sunflower seeds in the garden. (我们在花园里种了向日葵种子。)
Can you help me pull these weeds out of the garden? (你能帮我把花园里的杂草拔掉吗？)
We pulled up all the dead plants in the garden. (我们把花园里所有枯死的植物都拔了。)
The rose has a long green stem with thorns. (玫瑰花有长长的绿色茎，上面有刺。)
The roots of this tree go deep into the ground. (这棵树的根深深扎入地下。)
The lotus flower is a symbol of purity in Chinese culture. (莲花在中国文化中是纯洁的象征。)
We went boating on the lake last Sunday. (上周日我们去湖上划船了。)
I want to travel around the world one day. (我希望有一天能环游世界。)
The moon is round and bright tonight. (今晚的月亮又圆又亮。)

meaning: 不同的；有区别的；有差异的
example: My opinion is different from yours. (我的观点和你的不同。)
Is there a better way to solve this problem? (有更好的方法来解决这个问题吗？)
There is a beautiful bridge over the river. (河上有一座美丽的桥。)
We should protect nature and the environment. (我们应该保护大自然和环境。)
The waterfall is so high that it looks like a white curtain. (瀑布很高，看起来像白色的帘子。)
Many wild animals live in the forest. (许多野生动物生活在森林里。)
Beijing is famous for the Great Wall. (北京以长城闻名。)
We climbed to the top of the mountain and saw the sunrise. (我们爬到山顶，看到了日出。)
The wind is blowing hard outside. (外面的风刮得很大。)

meaning: (尤指短程往返的)旅行，旅游，出行
example: We are going on a school trip to the museum next week. (下周我们要去博物馆进行学校旅行。)
It is dangerous to swim in this river. (在这条河里游泳很危险。)
The heavy rain lasted for three hours. (大雨持续了三个小时。)
We stayed in a nice hotel near the beach. (我们住在海滩附近一家不错的旅馆。)
Please close the window. It's cold outside. (请关上窗户，外面冷。)
Don't forget to take your umbrella. It might rain. (别忘了带伞，可能要下雨。)
I wore my raincoat because it was raining heavily. (我穿了雨衣，因为雨下得很大。)
Don't worry about the exam. You will do fine. (别担心考试，你会考好的。)
It's a fine day for a picnic. (今天是个晴朗的野餐好天气。)
The fog was so thick that we couldn't see the road. (雾太大了，我们看不清路。)
The heavy rain caused a flood in the village. (暴雨导致村庄发生了洪水。)
Call 119 if there is a fire. (如果发生火灾，请拨打119。)
Do you know the answer to this question? (你知道这个问题的答案吗？)
Please wash your hands before eating. (吃饭前请洗手。)
We went hiking in the forest last weekend. (上周末我们去森林里徒步旅行了。)
Please bring your textbook to class tomorrow. (明天请把课本带到课堂上来。)
